hero.subtitle: We deploy long-range decentralized IoT networks. Real-time monitoring for agriculture and industry, without depending on cellular networks.

vision.p1: Just as fungi connect the forest through an extensive and invisible underground network —the mycelium—, our LoRaWAN gateways connect every physical asset of your company into a single data platform.
vision.p2Start: From electric fencers and water tanks to silos and heavy machinery, we create
vision.p2End: that give a true nervous system to your physical operation.

solutions.title: B2B Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Fast deployment, energy autonomy and kilometric range. Monitor critical variables without relying on cellular coverage.

smartAgro.title: Smart Agro
smartAgro.desc: Monitoring of 9000V electric fencers, water level measurement in tanks, and real-time GPS cattle tracking.

industry.title: Industry 4.0
industry.desc: Predictive maintenance for heavy machinery and control of physical variables (temperature, vibration, humidity) in industrial plants.

infra.title: Autonomous Infrastructure
infra.desc: Solar nodes and ultra-long lasting batteries (up to 10 years). Our private LoRaWAN connectivity guarantees sovereignty over your data, operating where 4G/5G doesn't reach.

footer.ctaTitle: Eliminate blind spots in your business today.
footer.description: The mycelium of technology. Decentralized LoRaWAN networks for agriculture and heavy industry.
